calendar.matters:
Petiton To Authorize Approval Of Second Amendment To Declartion Of Covenants, Condtions And Restrictions And Amendment To Articles Of Incorporation Of Jackson Towers Condominium Homeowners' Association
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petiton To Authorize Approval Of Second Amendment To Declartion Of Covenants, Condtions And Restrictions And Amendment To Articles Of Incorporation Of Jackson Towers Condominium Homeowners' Association is GRANTED. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
